channel.title: Terms on diogoagra.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Terms on diogoagra.dev

item.title: Line Out: Terms of Use
item.description:
Terms of Use - Line Out

1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading and using the game Line Out, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any term, please do not use the game.

2. License to Use

You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, and non-transferable license to use Line Out for personal and non-commercial use. You must not:

  • Attempt to decompile or reverse engineer the software.
  • Remove any copyright or proprietary notices.
  • Distribute the game on platforms not authorized by the Developer.

3. Disclaimer

Line Out is provided “as is” (AS IS). The Developer makes no warranties that the game will be free of errors or interruptions. Use of the game is at your own risk.
